name: Mom's Crispy Chicken and Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Pierce potatoes with fork tines; microwave on HIGH for 8 minutes. Meanwhile, beat egg and water in a shallow dish. Place corn flake crumbs in another shallow dish.
3. Dip chicken pieces into the egg mixture, then coat completely with crumbs. Spray a rimmed baking sheet with vegetable cooking spray and place the chicken on it.
4. Cut potatoes into 1-inch chunks and add to the sheet with the chicken. Spray potatoes with cooking spray and sprinkle with sage. Season chicken and potatoes with salt and pepper.
5. Bake for about 40 minutes, or until juices run clear when a chicken piece is pierced and potatoes are golden brown.
6. In a bowl, mix barbecue sauce, honey, and yellow mustard to make the dipping sauce.
7. Serve crispy chicken and potatoes with the sauce.
